qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_organigrama as oi_organigrama, t0.c_organigrama as c_organigrama, t0.d_organigrama as d_organigrama, t0.e_version as e_version, t0.e_version_pub as e_version_pub, t0.l_automatica as l_automatica, SEC.policy, t0.c_organigrama as CODE, t0.d_organigrama as TEXT FROM SEG01_ORGANIGRAMAS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Seguridad.Organigramas.ORGANIGRAMA\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_organigrama LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_organigrama asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_organigrama as oi_organigrama, SEC.policy FROM SEG01_ORGANIGRAMAS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Seguridad.Organigramas.ORGANIGRAMA\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_organigrama LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_organigrama asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Seguridad.Organigramas.ORGANIGRAMA.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Seguridad.Organigramas.ORGANIGRAMA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SEG01_ORGANIGRAMAS.oi_organigrama) as CNT from SEG01_ORGANIGRAMAS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SEG01_ORGANIGRAMAS.oi_organigrama={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SEG01_ORGANIGRAMAS.d_organigrama,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SEG01_ORGANIGRAMAS.c_organigrama,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_organigrama as oi_organigrama, T.c_organigrama as c_organigrama, T.d_organigrama as d_organigrama, T.e_version as e_version, T.e_version_pub as e_version_pub FROM SEG01_ORGANIGRAMAS as T WHERE T.oi_organigrama in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: entidad1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in path('Nomad\\Base\\Login\\Entidades')/Entidad

qry:select.name: entidad2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in FILE('Nomad\\Base\\Login\\Entidades\\{%= #PARAM:@FILE %}')/ENTIDAD

qry:select.name: qry_join
cuentas1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in path('Nomad\\Base\\Login\\Cuentas')/Cuenta

qry:select.name: cuentas2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in FILE('Nomad\\Base\\Login\\Cuentas\\{%= #PARAM:@FILE %}')/CUENTA

qry:select.name: user1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in path('Nomad\\Base\\Login\\Cuentas')/Cuenta

qry:select.name: user2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in FILE('Nomad\\Base\\Login\\Cuentas\\{%=#PARAM:@file%}')/CUENTA/ENTIDAD[@value=#ETTY:@id]

qry:select.name: persona
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal FROM PER01_PERSONAL WHERE PER01_PERSONAL.oi_usuario_sistema = {#ETTY:@id} ')ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Seguridad.Organigramas.ROLE.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Seguridad.Organigramas.ROLE.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SEG01_ROLES.oi_role) as CNT from SEG01_ROLES Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SEG01_ROLES.oi_role={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SEG01_ROLES.d_role,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SEG01_ROLES.c_role,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SEG01_ROLES.oi_organigrama={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' select T.oi_role as oi_role, T.c_role as c_role, T.d_role as d_role, T.d_color as d_color, T.l_inferiores as l_inferiores, T.l_iguales as l_iguales, T.l_inferioresg as l_inferioresg, T.l_igualesg as l_igualesg, T.e_niveles_inf as e_niveles_inf, T.oi_organigrama as oi_organigrama, P.c_organigrama as c_organigrama, P.d_organigrama as d_organigrama from SEG01_ROLES as T, SEG01_ORGANIGRAMAS as P join T.oi_organigrama inner P.oi_organigrama WHERE T.oi_role in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

NucleusRH.Base.Seguridad.Organigramas.ESTRUCTURA.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SEG01_ESTRUCTURA.oi_estructura) as CNT from SEG01_ESTRUCTURA Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SEG01_ESTRUCTURA.oi_estructura={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SEG01_ESTRUCTURA.d_estructura,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SEG01_ESTRUCTURA.c_estructura,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SEG01_ESTRUCTURA.oi_organigrama={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' select T.oi_estructura as oi_estructura, T.c_estructura as c_estructura, T.d_estructura as d_estructura, T.oi_organigrama as oi_organigrama, P.c_organigrama as c_organigrama, P.d_organigrama as d_organigrama from SEG01_ESTRUCTURA as T, SEG01_ORGANIGRAMAS as P join T.oi_organigrama inner P.oi_organigrama WHERE T.oi_estructura in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT SEG01_ROLES.oi_role, SEG01_ROLES.c_role, SEG01_ROLES.d_role FROM SEG01_ROLES ')/ROWS/ROW

resource.declare: <DATO value="A1"> <object edit_time="20120712172734" edit_user="akababe" new_time="20120508134619" new_user="akababe" version="126" nmd-A="1" nmd-C="0" nmd-R="1" class="NucleusRH.Base.Seguridad.Organigramas.ORGANIGRAMA" id="1"> <ORGANIGRAMA descr="[ORG:SEG] Seguridad" l_automatica="1" e_version_pub="1" e_version="1" d_organigrama="Seguridad" c_organigrama="ORG:SEG" id="1"> <ROLES nmd-ld="0" /> <ESTRUCTURA nmd-ld="1"> <ESTRUCTURA descr=" - [A1] Administador 1" c_role="1" d_estructura="Administador 1" c_estructura="A1" oi_organigrama="1" id="809"> <PER_ESTR nmd-ld="1"> <PERSONAL_ESTR descr="Nuevo" nmd-status="~i," id="~2E6C9F44E3F2-2E6C9FB754D2-000000000007"> <oi_personal value="405" /> </PERSONAL_ESTR> </PER_ESTR> </ESTRUCTURA> <ESTRUCTURA descr=" - [J11] Jefe 1_1" c_estr_padre="A1" c_role="2" d_estructura="Jefe 1_1" c_estructura="J11" oi_organigrama="1" id="811"> <PER_ESTR nmd-ld="0" /> </ESTRUCTURA> <ESTRUCTURA descr=" - [C11] Colaboradores 1_1" c_estr_padre="J11" c_role="3" d_estructura="Colaboradores 1_1" c_estructura="C11" oi_organigrama="1" id="812"> <PER_ESTR nmd-ld="0" /> </ESTRUCTURA> </ESTRUCTURA> </ORGANIGRAMA> </object> </DATO>
resource.name: QRY_CHILDS

qry:select.name: SQL_ESTR
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:/ESTRUCTURA[@c_estr_padre=#FILTRO:@value]

resource.description: Devuelve todas las estructuras que no tienen padre
resource.name: QRY_ESTRUC_PARENT

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT SEG01_ESTRUCTURA.oi_estructura FROM SEG01_ESTRUCTURA WHERE SEG01_ESTRUCTURA.oi_organigrama = {#PARAM:@oi_organigrama} AND (ISNULL(SEG01_ESTRUCTURA.c_estr_padre) or SEG01_ESTRUCTURA.c_estr_padre = \'\') ')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Devuelve todas las personas que fueron eliminadas sin seguridad
resource.name: QRY_PERSONAS_ESTR

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT SEG01_PER_ESTR.oi_personal_estr, SEG01_PER_ESTR.oi_estructura FROM SEG01_PER_ESTR WHERE SEG01_PER_ESTR.l_borrado = 1 ')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Devuelve todos los grupos que fueron eliminados sin seguridad
resource.name: QRY_GRUPOS_ESTR

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT SEG01_GRUPO_ESTR.oi_grupo_estr, SEG01_GRUPO_ESTR.oi_estructura FROM SEG01_GRUPO_ESTR WHERE SEG01_GRUPO_ESTR.l_borrado = 1 ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Seguridad.Organigramas.PERSONAL_ESTR.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Seguridad.Organigramas.PERSONAL_ESTR.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SEG01_PER_ESTR.oi_personal_estr) as CNT from SEG01_PER_ESTR, PER01_PERSONAL join SEG01_PER_ESTR.OI_PERSONAL inner PER01_PERSONAL.OI_PERSONAL Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SEG01_PER_ESTR.oi_personal_estr={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(PER01_PERSONAL.c_personal,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SEG01_PER_ESTR.oi_estructura={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_PER
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT SEG01_PER_ESTR.oi_estructura, SEG01_PER_ESTR.l_borrado, PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, PER01_PERSONAL.c_personal, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom, PER01_PERSONAL.oi_usuario_sistema FROM SEG01_PER_ESTR, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal LEFT OUTER SEG01_PER_ESTR.oi_personal WHERE PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal = {#SOURCE:@oi_personal} {%? ($SOURCE/@oi_estructura!='') {% AND SEG01_PER_ESTR.oi_estructura = {#SOURCE:@oi_estructura} %} {% %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_LEG
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal = {%=$SOURCE/@oi_personal %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_PER
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT SEG01_PER_ESTR.oi_personal_estr, PER01_PERSONAL.c_personal, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom FROM SEG01_PER_ESTR, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN SEG01_PER_ESTR.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal WHERE SEG01_PER_ESTR.oi_estructura = {#FILTRO:@oi_estructura} AND SEG01_PER_ESTR.oi_personal in ({%=#SOURCE:VALUES/@IDS%}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_PER
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL JOIN PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal LEFT OUTER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal WHERE PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal in ({%=$SOURCE/@IDS %})
{%? ($SOURCE/@ESTR!='') {% PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal in (select oi_personal from SEG01_ESTRUCTURA where oi_estructura={%=$SOURCE/@ESTR %}) %} {% %} %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_ESTR
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, SEG01_PER_ESTR JOIN PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal INNER SEG01_PER_ESTR.oi_personal, PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal LEFT OUTER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal WHERE SEG01_PER_ESTR.oi_estructura={%=$SOURCE/@ESTR %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_PER
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT SEG01_PER_ESTR.oi_estructura, SEG01_PER_ESTR.l_borrado, PER01_PERSONAL.c_personal, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom, PER01_PERSONAL.oi_usuario_sistema, SEG01_ESTRUCTURA.d_estructura FROM SEG01_PER_ESTR, PER01_PERSONAL, SEG01_ESTRUCTURA JOIN SEG01_PER_ESTR.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, SEG01_PER_ESTR.oi_estructura INNER SEG01_ESTRUCTURA.oi_estructura WHERE SEG01_PER_ESTR.oi_personal = {#SOURCE:@oi_personal} AND SEG01_PER_ESTR.l_borrado = 0 ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_PER
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, SEG01_PER_ESTR JOIN SEG01_PER_ESTR.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal LEFT OUTER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal WHERE SEG01_PER_ESTR.oi_personal_estr in ({%=$SOURCE/@IDS %}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_ESTR
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, SEG01_PER_ESTR JOIN PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal INNER SEG01_PER_ESTR.oi_personal, PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal LEFT OUTER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal WHERE SEG01_PER_ESTR.oi_estructura={%=$SOURCE/@ESTR %} ')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Devuelve los legajos y personas a eliminar
resource.name: QRY_LEGAJOS_ESTR_DEL

qry:select.name: QRY_PER
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, SEG01_PER_ESTR JOIN SEG01_PER_ESTR.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal, PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal LEFT OUTER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal WHERE SEG01_PER_ESTR.oi_personal_estr = {#SOURCE:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_ESTR
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, SEG01_PER_ESTR JOIN PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal INNER SEG01_PER_ESTR.oi_personal, PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal LEFT OUTER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal WHERE SEG01_PER_ESTR.oi_estructura={%=$SOURCE/@ESTR %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Seguridad.Organigramas.GRUPO_ESTR.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Seguridad.Organigramas.GRUPO_ESTR.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(SEG01_GRUPO_ESTR.oi_grupo_estr) as CNT from SEG01_GRUPO_ESTR, SEG02_GRUPOS join SEG01_GRUPO_ESTR.OI_GRUPO inner SEG02_GRUPOS.OI_GRUPO Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and SEG01_GRUPO_ESTR.oi_grupo_estr={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(SEG02_GRUPOS.d_grupo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(SEG02_GRUPOS.c_grupo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and SEG01_GRUPO_ESTR.oi_estructura={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_GRUPO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT SEG01_GRUPO_ESTR.oi_estructura, SEG01_GRUPO_ESTR.l_borrado, SEG01_GRUPO_ESTR.oi_grupo, SEG02_GRUPOS.c_grupo, SEG02_GRUPOS.d_grupo, SEG01_ESTRUCTURA.d_estructura FROM SEG01_GRUPO_ESTR, SEG02_GRUPOS, SEG01_ESTRUCTURA JOIN SEG01_GRUPO_ESTR.oi_grupo INNER SEG02_GRUPOS.oi_grupo, SEG01_GRUPO_ESTR.oi_estructura INNER SEG01_ESTRUCTURA.oi_estructura WHERE SEG02_GRUPOS.oi_grupo = {#SOURCE:@oi_grupo} and SEG01_GRUPO_ESTR.oi_estructura = {#SOURCE:@oi_estructura} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_GRUPO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT SEG01_GRUPO_ESTR.oi_estructura, SEG01_GRUPO_ESTR.l_borrado, SEG01_GRUPO_ESTR.oi_grupo, SEG02_GRUPOS.c_grupo, SEG02_GRUPOS.d_grupo, SEG01_ESTRUCTURA.d_estructura FROM SEG01_GRUPO_ESTR, SEG02_GRUPOS, SEG01_ESTRUCTURA JOIN SEG01_GRUPO_ESTR.oi_grupo INNER SEG02_GRUPOS.oi_grupo, SEG01_GRUPO_ESTR.oi_estructura INNER SEG01_ESTRUCTURA.oi_estructura WHERE SEG02_GRUPOS.oi_grupo = {#SOURCE:@oi_grupo} and SEG01_GRUPO_ESTR.l_borrado = 0 ')/ROWS/ROW
